series_metadata.series_description: As of 01/21/2018 the Ohio State Barber Board has been abolished and all active and retained schedules have moved to the State Cosmetology and Barber Board. This series contains consumer complaints regarding a business or individual. Includes correspondences from consumer, Board office and offender/respondent.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: investigation is complete, unless matter goes hearing. If matter goes hearing final appeal date
